steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals longest side times shortest side. Let $w$ be the shortest side. Since the area is $72$ and the longest side is $18$, use $72=18w$.

steps.title: Set up the rectangle area equation
steps.content:
The area of a rectangle equals length times width. We know the area is 72 square inches and the longest side is 18 inches. Let $w$ represent the shortest side:
$$72 = 18w$$

steps.title: Solve for the shortest side
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 18:
$$w = \frac{72}{18} = 4$$
The shortest side of the rectangle is 4 inches.
